title: Calculate Square of a Side and Display Result

content.problemStatement:
"In this problem, you are given the `Square` class with an attribute side to store the `side` length of a square. Your task is to complete the program by filling in the missing lines to calculate the square of the `side` and call the `display` function to show the result."

---
**Expected output:**
```default
25
Displayed the square
```
